meaning: v.为fly的过去式及过去分词,(棒球)打出高飞球
examples: The plane flied high in the sky.
In the dream, I had wings and flied freely.
Wells followed with a single and Ichiro Suzuki doubled before Eduardo Nunez flied to center.
The 34-year-old outfielder flied out twice and had a hard grounder during a three-run sixth.
